title: CommunityBoard
description: One of Queens' 14 community boards — the local advisory body whose members the Borough President appoints. Canonical schema reconciling the 'Queens Community Board District Managers and Chairs' Open Data dataset (8z5h-tzdr, 20 columns) with the /community-boards page on queensbp.nyc.gov. Carries the board office (district manager, chair, address, monthly meeting) and the NYC geography spine.

board.description: Community board number ('Board' / 'Community Board') — primary key within Queens.

chair.description: Community board chair ('CB Chair - First Name' / 'CB Chair - Last Name').

monthlyMeeting.description: When the board holds its monthly full membership meeting ('Monthly Meeting').
